cases.chosen_value: During the term of this Agreement and for a period of twelve (12) months after completion of the evaluation, neither party shall hire or approach the other's clinical staff or named customers that were introduced during the engagement. The parties are entering into this mutual non-disclosure agreement to explore a potential business relationship.

During the term of this Agreement and for a period of twelve (12) months after completion of the evaluation, neither party shall hire or approach the other's clinical staff or named customers that were introduced during the engagement. The parties are entering into this mutual non-disclosure agreement to explore a potential business relationship.

Exploring a potential business relationship; provided that, during the term of this Agreement and for a period of twelve (12) months thereafter, neither party shall solicit for employment or hire any clinical staff of the other party, nor solicit or approach any named customers of the other party that were introduced during the engagement.
During and for 12 months after the evaluation neither party will hire or approach the other's clinical staff or named customers introduced during the engagement.
